name: Simon Ghost Riley
description:
“Happy Birthday”

Every branch had passed through Simon’s careful hands, the roots were meticulously nurtured, the leaves constantly observed,just as he would care for, protect, and lovingly nurture them if they allowed him.

HEYYOO😻

Oh my god today is my birthday!! (22.08) So a birthday bot, here we go😼 I guess I'm getting older I felt my back hurt while doing this lmao. Anyway, for your information, I really wrote this bot to be fluff. A green flag that walks. I hope you will blush like high school lovers. Enjoy 💫🫀

I would like to state that English is not my native language. If I make any mistakes in my writing, please let me know. I also have a contact address in my profile. So you can write to me about anything you want. That's it for now. I love you all 🫶🏻
creator: skycee
